description: Shared Signal Flow concept vocabulary for puzzle and curriculum metadata validation.

concepts.label: Signal Direction
concepts.description: Signals move from outputs or sources toward inputs or destinations.

concepts.label: Input vs Output
concepts.description: Distinguishing source/output jacks from destination/input jacks.

concepts.label: Source to Input
concepts.description: Patching a source to the intended channel or stage input.

concepts.label: Console Output
concepts.description: An output from a console, mixer, or routing surface.

concepts.label: Wrong Signal Type
concepts.description: An attempted route uses incompatible signal types.

concepts.label: Wrong Destination
concepts.description: An attempted route lands on the wrong destination.

concepts.label: Wrong Bus
concepts.description: An attempted route uses the wrong output bus or feed.

concepts.label: Feedback Risk
concepts.description: A route could create acoustic or electronic feedback.

concepts.label: Troubleshooting
concepts.description: Finding and correcting an existing fault.

concepts.label: Diagnostic Reasoning
concepts.description: Using symptoms and signal flow evidence to isolate a problem.

concepts.label: Multi-route Build
concepts.description: Completing several related routes in one scenario.

concepts.label: Channel Order
concepts.description: Keeping sources in an intended input order.

concepts.label: Left/Right
concepts.description: Maintaining left/right consistency.

concepts.label: Stereo Pair
concepts.description: Treating two related mono paths as a stereo pair.

concepts.label: Gain Staging
concepts.description: Keeping levels appropriate through a chain.

concepts.label: Pre-fader
concepts.description: A feed taken before channel fader level changes.

concepts.label: Post-fader
concepts.description: A feed taken after channel fader level changes.

concepts.label: Patchbay Normal
concepts.description: Understanding normalled patchbay connections.

concepts.label: Insert Direction
concepts.description: Correct send and return direction for inserts.

concepts.label: Phantom Power
concepts.description: Supplying or avoiding phantom power appropriately.

concepts.label: Record Feed
concepts.description: A feed intended for recording.

concepts.label: Broadcast Split
concepts.description: A dedicated broadcast or station split feed.

concepts.label: Stagebox
concepts.description: Stage input and snake/stagebox routing.

concepts.label: Drum Inputs
concepts.description: Drum source input routing.

concepts.label: Aux Send
concepts.description: Console auxiliary output routing.

concepts.label: Monitor Aux
concepts.description: Aux output used for a monitor feed.

concepts.label: Monitor Mix
concepts.description: A performer monitor mix or feed.

concepts.label: Monitor Wedge
concepts.description: Stage wedge monitor input routing.

concepts.label: Talkback
concepts.description: Talkback microphone or console talkback output routing.

concepts.label: Matrix Feed
concepts.description: Console matrix or zone feed routing.

concepts.label: Zone Feed
concepts.description: A dedicated destination or speaker-zone feed.

concepts.label: Front Fill
concepts.description: Front-fill speaker or local audience zone.

concepts.label: Main PA
concepts.description: Main public-address signal path.

concepts.label: Processor Chain
concepts.description: Signal must pass through a processor before the next stage.

concepts.label: Amplifier
concepts.description: Power amplifier input or output routing.

concepts.label: Speaker Level
concepts.description: High-power speaker-level signal handling.

concepts.label: Delay Tower
concepts.description: Delay speaker or remote tower feed.

concepts.label: Wireless
concepts.description: Wireless receiver, transmitter, or RF system.

concepts.label: RF vs Audio
concepts.description: Distinguishing radio-frequency antenna paths from audio outputs.

concepts.label: Press Feed
concepts.description: Press or media recorder output feed.

concepts.label: Stereo IEM
concepts.description: Stereo in-ear monitor transmitter feed.

concepts.label: FX Return
concepts.description: Returning an effects processor or playback source to the console.

concepts.label: Room Size
concepts.description: Matching acoustic size or decay to a scenario.

concepts.label: Room Material
concepts.description: Recognizing reflective, soft, or treated room qualities.

concepts.label: Ambience Match
concepts.description: Choosing an impulse response that matches production context.

concepts.label: Asset Selection
concepts.description: Choosing or matching game/music assets for a production goal.
